author: Lashaundra Weaver
review: Great customer service. They were willing to stay after hours to help me find the perfect vehicle at a reasonable price. Very nice and friendly, and my car runs like a champ!

author: Luke Phelps
review: Bought my kid's first car here. Great to work with.

author: Dean Cox
review: Very good place to buy from. Honest and fair pricing.

author: Derek Moll
review: Had a great time. They were very helpful the whole way through. The whole experience was fun and stress-free. I would recommend them to anyone in need of a good whip.

author: Randi Ford
review: Ali was great to buy from. Easy and fast process. We love our new car. Thank you!

author: Ahad Saqib
review: Great dealer and a good person to deal with. Prompt, respectful, and we got an excellent deal. I would highly recommend SQ Motors to anyone wanting a great car.

author: Seth Davidson
review: Solid place to buy a RAV4.

author: Tyrone Ferrell
review: Cars are good and he works with you. Quick and easy. Come and go with your first car.

author: Patrick Espina
review: Ameer was polite, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. I don't think we were there for more than an hour and we were very happy with the process.

author: Cyndi Featherman
review: Ameer and Ali were very friendly and accommodating. Love my car and would recommend them.

author: Abby May
review: This place is a gem and a find. Transparent and honest. When I had a question about the car's history, they were open and helpful.
